marketConsensusEstimate.rationale: Stock has been under pressure with recent downgrades and margin concerns. Options put/call ratio of 0.69 shows bullish bias but short interest increased 26.9%. Recent earnings beat suggests market may be overly pessimistic.

proxySignals.analystRevisions: Mixed - Citigroup upgraded to Buy on March 18, RBC maintained Outperform, but Piper Sandler downgraded to Neutral with $135 target. Recent downgrades citing Hispanic consumer softness
proxySignals.stockDrift: Down 17.4% over 12 months, -0.68% in last 30 days, trading at $152. Stock at 52-week low was $126.45 in November, recovered but still well below $196.91 high
proxySignals.optionsSentiment: Put/call ratio 0.69 indicates bullish sentiment. Historical data shows elevated put activity in some periods but current levels favor calls
proxySignals.shortInterest: Short interest at 7.5M shares (5.4% of float), up 26.9% over 12 months but down 2.8% recently. Days to cover at 4.8 days

myForecast.rationale: Company has beaten 3 of last 4 quarters and recent Q3 beat by 15.9%. Beer margins remain strong at 38% and management cost initiatives should support margins despite revenue headwinds.

expectedMove.rationale: Historical earnings moves average 5-7%. Beat potential with low expectations and oversold conditions suggest upside bias despite margin concerns.

trade.rationale: Risk/reward favors upside with earnings beat potential and stock trading near recent lows. Strong beer portfolio provides defensive characteristics.

marketConsensusEstimate.rationale: Recent stock drift showing 89% one-year rally and March Basel III capital relief creating bullish momentum. Options put/call ratio of 0.95 shows balanced sentiment, while declining short interest suggests reduced bearish positioning ahead of earnings.

proxySignals.analystRevisions: Recent mixed signals with Evercore lowering PT from $1075 to $950 and Jefferies cutting from $1125 to $1049, but maintaining Buy ratings. No major downgrades in March 2026.
proxySignals.stockDrift: Strong bullish setup with 89% one-year gain, though YTD down 5.6% and declined from Jan high of $970.75. Recent 4.79% single-day pop on earnings anticipation shows positive momentum.
proxySignals.optionsSentiment: Put/call ratio of 0.95 indicates balanced sentiment with slight bullish bias. IV building ahead of earnings with typical contango structure. Institutional hedging concentrated at $50 strike intervals.
proxySignals.shortInterest: Short interest at 5.812M shares (1.9% of float), relatively low level suggesting limited bearish positioning. Borrow rates remain modest indicating shares available for shorting.

myForecast.rationale: Basel III capital relief unlocks share buyback potential while M&A revival and trading revenue should exceed consensus. Insider selling at $965 suggests near-term ceiling but earnings beat likely.

expectedMove.rationale: Strong fundamental setup with regulatory tailwinds and M&A recovery momentum outweighs valuation concerns and insider selling pressure.

trade.rationale: Basel III regulatory unlock and earnings beat potential supports upside target, with stop below March lows to limit downside risk.

keyRisks: Insider selling of $112M in Q1 signals potential valuation ceiling
Private credit market concerns could pressure asset management revenues
Rising geopolitical tensions adding operational costs and trading volatility
